royal-heritage.name: Royal Heritage Bed
royal-heritage.tagline: A Masterpiece of Hand-Carved Royalty & Smart Storage.
royal-heritage.finish: Dark Walnut Polish with Gold Detailing
royal-heritage.headboard: Ornate hand-carved headboard featuring exquisite 24-carat gold leaf detailing.
royal-heritage.description: The Royal Heritage Bed is our crown jewel—a masterpiece of solid Sheesham wood hand-carved by master artisans. Combining timeless regal elegance with modern utility, this ottoman storage bed features traditional mortise and tenon joinery for uncompromising structural durability. It is not just a bed; it is an heirloom built to last for generations.

obsidian-sultan.name: Obsidian Sultan Bed
obsidian-sultan.description: Inspired by the grand courts of the Mughals, the Obsidian Sultan commands every room it enters. Its midnight-black lacquer finish and towering tufted headboard create a silhouette of pure authority. The Ottoman lift-up base provides massive hidden storage.

ivory-empress.name: Ivory Empress Bed
ivory-empress.tagline: Elegance carved in light and wood
ivory-empress.headboard: Fluted panel headboard with brass rail
ivory-empress.description: The Ivory Empress is femininity distilled into furniture. Pale oak tones, delicate fluted panels, and gleaming brass accents combine in a design that is both old-world and effortlessly modern. A complete divan set - mattress, base, and headboard - all in one.

cedar-throne.name: The Aurelia Tufted Velvet Chesterfield Bed
cedar-throne.headboard: The headboard is a masterclass in texture and scale. It features an extra-tall, towering silhouette adorned with deep, diamond-patterned button tufting that adds incredible depth and visual drama. Framing the tufting are elegant, softly structured wingback sides detailed with a delicate, shimmering nailhead trim. This architectural backdrop not only provides magnificent lower-back support for sitting up in bed but also establishes an undeniable sense of regal comfort and privacy.
cedar-throne.description: Inspired by the timeless elegance of classic estate furniture, the Aurelia Bed (as shown in Gemini_Generated_Image_8stfcs8stfcs8stf.png) transforms any bedroom into a luxurious sanctuary. Draped in high-sheen, crushed velvet that catches the light beautifully, this bed features dramatic, deep button-tufting across both the commanding headboard and the matching high-profile footboard. Designed for those who appreciate high-glamour interiors, it balances a bold silhouette with soft, touchable comfort, making it the undeniable centerpiece of the master suite.

deep-tufted-velvet-wingback-bed-frame.name: Deep Tufted Velvet Wingback Bed Frame
deep-tufted-velvet-wingback-bed-frame.tagline: "Sleep in Royalty: The Ultimate Statement of Elegance and Comfort."
deep-tufted-velvet-wingback-bed-frame.material: Premium Sky Blue Velvet Fabric Upholstery with a soft-touch plush finish.
deep-tufted-velvet-wingback-bed-frame.headboard: The bed frame features a magnificent, extra-tall floor-standing Wingback Headboard. It is intricately crafted with classic deep button tufting (Chesterfield style) that creates a luxurious, multi-dimensional texture. The elegant side wings wrap slightly forward, offering a cozy, cocoon-like shelter effect while framing your pillows beautifully.
deep-tufted-velvet-wingback-bed-frame.description: Transform your bedroom into a high-end luxury retreat with the Windsor Wingback Bed. Upholstered in an exquisite, velvety plush fabric, this bed frame brings both sophisticated drama and inviting comfort to any contemporary or classic UK home. The standout sky blue hue delivers a refreshing pop of colour, making it the undeniable centerpiece of the room. Built with a robust, heavy-duty wooden frame and supportive slatted base, it guarantees both lasting durability and excellent mattress support for a perfect night’s sleep.
features: Deep-buttoned diamond tufting on both the headboard and footboard provides a timeless, regal aesthetic.

sapphire-royal-velvet-wingback-bed.name: Sapphire Royal Velvet Wingback Bed
sapphire-royal-velvet-wingback-bed.tagline: Regal elegance meets plush, deep-tufted comfort.
sapphire-royal-velvet-wingback-bed.material: Solid Hardwood Frame, High-Density Foam, Premium Velvet Fabric
sapphire-royal-velvet-wingback-bed.finish: Royal Blue Velvet Upholstery with Chrome Base Accents
sapphire-royal-velvet-wingback-bed.headboard: An extra-tall, deeply cushioned Chesterfield-style button-tufted headboard, gracefully flanked by protective wingback sides detailed with precision metallic nailhead trim.
sapphire-royal-velvet-wingback-bed.description: Transform your bedroom into a luxurious sanctuary with this striking statement piece. Fully wrapped in an ultra-soft, dense royal blue velvet, this premium frame bed features an iconic tufted wingback silhouette that provides a comfortable backrest for sitting up in bed. Built upon a robust kiln-dried wood frame, it provides long-lasting structural durability while maintaining an ultra-sleek, low-profile modern aesthetic.
features: Heavy-duty solid wood internal construction for premium stability

the-obsidian-nocturne-tufted-bed.name: The Obsidian Nocturne Tufted Bed
the-obsidian-nocturne-tufted-bed.tagline: Where dramatic elegance meets midnight comfort.
the-obsidian-nocturne-tufted-bed.material: Crafted from a solid hardwood core with deep-tufted charcoal performance velvet and intricately carved espresso oak veneers.
the-obsidian-nocturne-tufted-bed.finish: Charcoal Black Velvet upholstery paired with a Dark Espresso / Espresso Oak wood finish.
the-obsidian-nocturne-tufted-bed.description: Anchored by bold textures and sophisticated dark tones, the Obsidian Nocturne Bed redefines modern luxury. It features an imposing, extra-tall headboard beautifully detailed with deep diamond button tufting that commands attention in any master suite. The bed's low-profile base balances this grand height, showcasing an intricately carved geometric lattice pattern on the footboard that adds a subtle touch of artisanal craftsmanship to a sleek, contemporary silhouette.
features: A heavy-duty wooden slat system eliminates the need for a traditional box spring, maintaining a clean, low-profile look.
